finalized_plan.description: Use the search_agent to obtain a reliable and complete list of all county seats in Washington state, along with their reported land areas from authoritative sources
From the list, identify the county seat with the largest land area and the one with the smallest land area
Retrieve the official 2020 census population figures for these two county seats using data sourced directly from data.census.gov
Compute the integer difference between the populations of the largest and smallest county seats
Verify each step to ensure accuracy and consistency with the census data before delivering the final answer

root_cause_reasoning: The agent did not perform any search and directly generated the answer
